lost_and_found.name: Golden Retriever
lost_and_found.description: Friendly Golden Retriever wearing a blue collar. Answers to "Max". Last seen near the children playground.

lost_and_found.name: iPhone 14 Pro - Black
lost_and_found.description: Found a black iPhone 14 Pro in the gym locker room. It has a cracked screen protector and a Clear MagSafe case.

lost_and_found.name: House Keys — 3 Keys
lost_and_found.description: Set of 3 keys on a red keychain. Includes a car remote for a Toyota.

lost_and_found.name: Brown Leather Wallet
lost_and_found.description: Bifold brown leather wallet. Contains a driver license and some loyalty cards. No cash inside.

lost_and_found.name: Amazon Kindle Paperwhite
lost_and_found.description: Kindle Paperwhite found on a sun lounger. It has a fabric cover with a floral pattern.

lost_and_found.name: Blue North Face Jacket
lost_and_found.description: Dark blue North Face puffer jacket, size Large. Left on the benches near the basketball court.

lost_and_found.name: Nike Runners (Size 10)
lost_and_found.description: Grey Nike running shoes, size 10. Found near the entrance of Tennis Court 2.

lost_and_found.name: Reading Glasses — RayBan
lost_and_found.description: RayBan reading glasses with a black frame. Lost somewhere between the main lobby and the elevator.
